AstraWear — LLM guidance for indexing and safe consumption

Site purpose:
- AstraWear is an e-commerce storefront for apparel and accessories. Primary public content includes product pages, collections, marketing pages, help/FAQ, and blog-style content.

Important pages to index (public, canonical):
- https://astrawear.vercel.app/                Home — featured products and collections
- https://astrawear.vercel.app/about/          Company info
- https://astrawear.vercel.app/collections/    Collections listing
- https://astrawear.vercel.app/product/:slug   Product detail pages (dynamic)
- https://astrawear.vercel.app/faq/            FAQ and support
- https://astrawear.vercel.app/contact-support/ Contact form / support
- https://astrawear.vercel.app/place-order/    Checkout (do NOT cache sensitive checkout data)

Indexing & crawling guidance:
- Prefer fully rendered HTML and the canonical URL when present.
- For product pages capture: title, short description, full description, price, SKU, availability, image URLs, and the canonical product URL.
- Do not index or store user/account pages (`/user/*`, order history, checkout form data) or any PII (emails, addresses, payment info).
- Respect `robots.txt` and `sitemap.xml` discovery.

Data handling & privacy:
- Never attempt to authenticate or access gated resources to extract data.
- Redact or exclude any PII encountered in user-submitted content before storing or using it.

Snapshot & mirror recommendations:
- Use clean rendered HTML → convert to Markdown using semantic headings and absolute image URLs.
- Include page metadata (title, url, lastmod) in frontmatter where possible.

Rate limits & API usage:
- Use polite crawling rates, obey `robots.txt` rules and the sitemap.
- Prefer public documented APIs if available and rate-limited; otherwise rely on HTML snapshots.

Contact:
- If in doubt about what to index, consult `https://astrawear.vercel.app/sitemap.xml`.

Last updated: 2026-05-19
